CVE-2025-55014.title: The YouDao plugin for StarDict, as used in stardict 3.0.7+git2022 ...
CVE-2025-55014.description: The YouDao plugin for StarDict, as used in stardict 3.0.7+git20220909+dfsg-6 in Debian trixie and elsewhere, sends an X11 selection to the dict.youdao.com and dict.cn servers via cleartext HTTP.
